title: Shadeless Mobs
description: All mobs (included modded) are now shadeless.
body:
Minecraft's default shading is now disabled for all mobs. This mod intercepts mob models during startup and recreates them with shading turned off. It works automatically on all vanilla and modded mobs.

![chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae439b052e2bd144e84acedc2d6745c176844e3.png)

**Pairs well with [Shadeless Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/shadeless-blocks)**
